name: Amcor Plc
analysis: AMC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$57.2654. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$58.5300, stop A$51.8958, target A$64.4997 (0.90:1) — then trail it.
